questionHtml:
What occurs during inspiration?

A.  Internal intercostal muscles contract, increasing the pressure in the thorax.

B.  Internal intercostal muscles contract, decreasing the pressure in the thorax.

C.  External intercostal muscles contract, decreasing the pressure in the thorax.

D.  External intercostal muscles contract, increasing the pressure in the thorax.

meta.title: What occurs during inspiration? A. Internal intercostal muscles contract, increasing the pressure in the thorax. B. Internal intercostal muscles contract, decreasing the pressure i
